title: Building a Small Date library
body: building a small date library by jonathan peterson march the king is dead long live back on sep momentjs kb added new section to their homepage called project status which details that in maintenance mode and they recommend against using it projects seems like lot of people turn dayjs as an alternative lightweight has nearly identical apis i am process rewriting my time picker i’ve been evaluating dependencies impact have developers being able use pickers maintainability originally decided replacement mean why not smaller modern basically drop replace until needed plugins ended up needing at least three additional get same functionality from moment if was going these web app or something don’t think weight would be issue however didn’t should impose developer who just wants create own could provide functions native javascript this doesn’t cover everything moment.js but meets needs it’s only thanks latest version you can extend classes class datetime extends important because outside object means all things normally do with done note code works evergreen browsers care about old safari ie may want make polyfills stop accepting requirements one quick major difference between two libraries mutable vs day.js var moment.format t moment.add day versus day.format day.add pure function returns instance day2.format keep well how some already best document whole thing so hopefully need great explanation i’ll highlight i’m intl for localization set locale whatever intl.datetimeformat support bcp strings e.g en-us defaults user’s browser preference dt console.log(dt.format assuming default dt.locale de german also benefit allowing chainable actions console.log(dt.setlocale(‘de’).startof(‘month’).format most part are interchangeable call datetime.sethours date.sethours methods startof available somewhere else datetime.convert(date point out necessary convert you’re constructing example above simply provided clone method similar dt.setdate dt.clone dt.setyear both there endof might guessed bring end beginning particular unit used here dt.endof(‘date behind scenes calls this.sethours rather than separate add subtract single manipulate method.this takes integer positive negative plus affect dt.manipulate formatting features way define what format acceptable users formatted select dates now provides through me feel clean format(‘mm/dd/yyyy you’d moment/day.js c requires template always produce expected result following will märz dt.format month isbefore isafter isbetween issame moments except course heavy lifting datetime().manipulate february pm dt.isbefore(new false dt.isafter(new true since expecting results created return flat parts intl.datetimeformat('en year numeric formattoparts(new type value proto literal second order array never see come logical sense including literals bit pointless no know where string those approach remove dayperiod hour minute timezonename edt weekday tuesday find much cleaner information get/set shortcuts various getseconds setseconds instead datetime().seconds other bonus week couple monthformatted digit does shift had whose idea github play stackblitz
excerpt: I created a small date library for javascript using native function and no external dependencies as a replacement for needing moment.js or day.js.
tags: date, javascript, open source, time, moment.js, day.js
